goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be in the 'centre' and should serve 'christmas' food.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'italian' food.
Make sure you get 'price range' and 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'wednesday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should go to 'london liverpool street' and should 'leave after 09:15'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time' and 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the centre and should serve christmas food
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves italian food
Make sure you get price range and postcode
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave on wednesday and should depart from cambridge
The train should go to london liverpool street and should leave after 09:15
Make sure you get arrival time and price
